creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 202288
patch to update graphics/qgis from 3.4.3 to 3.6.0

This is a minor update from QGIS version 3.4.3 to 3.6.0.


Changes of the port:
- Update to 3.6.0
- Add dependency of graphics/exiv2
- Update dependency of astro/gpsbabel
- Remove doubling dependency of www/fcgi
- Remove files/patch-src_core_qgsproject.cpp,
  after it is upstream now
- Update pkg-plist


The patch is tested on Poudriere (11.2i/a, 12.0i/a, and HEADi/a),
'portlint -AC' seems happy.
